title: NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates family as a Subject Matter Expert in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates:
NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates!
